Fastest access, limited capacity, and subject to eviction."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Schema"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Column"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"TEXT"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"UUIDv4 timestamp"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"access_count"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"INTEGER"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Read frequency"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"FTS5 Triggers"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite FTS5 indices are maintained automatically via triggers:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"CREATE TRIGGER working_fts_insert\nAFTER INSERT ON working_memory\nBEGIN\n  INSERT INTO working_fts(rowid, content, tags)\n  VALUES (NEW.rowid, NEW.content, json_extract(NEW.tags, '$'));\nEND;\n","language":"sql"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Eviction Policy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Working Memory reaches capacity, entries are evicted by:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance weighting"}],": Higher importance = lower eviction priority"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recency"}],": Recently accessed entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access frequency"}],": Frequently read entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Composite score"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score = importance * recency * frequency"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Path"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Diagram Error:"}]," ","document is not defined"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"API Reference"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Store\nmem.remember(content, tags=[], importance=0.5, source=\"user\")\n\n# Recall\nresults = mem.recall(query, top_k=10, tags=None, since=None)\n\n# Get by ID\nentry = mem.get(id)\n\n# Update\nmem.update(id, content=None, importance=None, tags=None)\n\n# Delete\nmem.forget(id)\nmem.forget_all(tags=None, since=None)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Metric"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Value"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median write"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median read"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Median recall"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Max capacity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"1,000 entries (default)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory footprint"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50MB per 1K entries"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n","$L3"],["$L4"],"$L5"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"GDtznscqTPuT1Y-yMCstU"}
3:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use high importance (0.8+) for critical facts you want promoted to Episodic Memory.
